assumption: Energy demand changes through growth and efficiency
risk_if_wrong: Rebound sectoral shifts or electrification could change demand trajectories
review_action: Test demand sensitivity and sector-specific demand modules

assumption: Clean energy share reduces emissions intensity
risk_if_wrong: Life-cycle emissions reliability and supply-chain constraints may be hidden
review_action: Add sector-specific technology and life-cycle accounting

risk_if_wrong: Real climate response is nonlinear uncertain and regionally uneven
review_action: Use climate scenarios and uncertainty ranges

risk_if_wrong: Adaptation may be delayed maladaptive unequal or insufficient
review_action: Test weak delayed and equity-targeted adaptation cases

assumption: Land pressure and water stress are simplified resource indicators
risk_if_wrong: Spatial ecological and hydrological dynamics may be misrepresented
review_action: Use geospatial land water and biodiversity modules where needed

assumption: Equity is represented as a normalized diagnostic
risk_if_wrong: Justice rights vulnerability and legitimacy cannot be reduced to one number
review_action: Use distributional metrics and participatory review

assumption: Sustainability score is a diagnostic not a decision rule
risk_if_wrong: Weights can hide contested values and tradeoffs
review_action: Publish weights and test alternative weighting schemes

assumption: Pathways are conditional futures not predictions
risk_if_wrong: Users may mistake scenarios for forecasts
review_action: Communicate assumptions uncertainty and valid use clearly
